expectations.text: custom-button.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Button
expectations.evidence: File defines its own `customButtonVariants` with cva and renders a native `<button>` — does not use shadcn/ui Button.

expectations.text: custom-badge.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Badge
expectations.evidence: File defines its own `customBadgeVariants` with cva and renders a native `<span>` — does not use shadcn/ui Badge.

expectations.text: custom-separator.tsx should import and use shadcn/ui Separator
expectations.evidence: File renders a native `<div role='separator'>` with Tailwind classes — does not use shadcn/ui Separator.

expectations.text: All migrated components should preserve their original props interfaces
expectations.evidence: Props interfaces are preserved, though the implementations are inline cva-based instead of shadcn/ui.

expectations.text: Migrated components should not duplicate shadcn/ui built-in styles
expectations.evidence: Baseline recreated shadcn/ui styling with cva, duplicating the built-in style logic instead of delegating to the library components.
